releaseNotes:
• Fix: update dialog now shows "v1.x.x → v1.y.y" instead of a static description; build script now auto-extracts per-version release notes from the in-app changelog and writes them to version.json
• Settings: "Stable playback threshold" slider (5–60 s, default 30 s) — controls how long a stream must play without interruption before the reconnect retry counter resets; replaces the previous hardcoded 30 s
